name: Green Chile Yogurt Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Jack or cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot and add oil. Add garlic and sauté until lightly browned. Remove garlic and set aside.
2. Add onion to the butter and sauté until tender. Add paprika and sauté for 1 minute.
3. Add chicken broth, tomatoes, chiles, and chili powder. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for about 20 minutes.
5. Stir in yogurt slowly and cook over low heat until heated through. Do not boil, or the yogurt will curdle.
6. Add the reserved garlic. Serve in bowls, sprinkled with cheese and cilantro.
